market-data.purpose: All real-time market data: prices, analyst ratings, earnings dates, macro indicators, sector performance

local-inference.purpose: Portfolio text extraction and notification message formatting

notifications.purpose: Progress updates and final report delivery. Set NOTIFICATION_MCP_TOOL to your provider's tool name (e.g. mcp__slack__slack_post_message).

anti_patterns: Do not use WebSearch or WebFetch for market data — route through market-data connector
Do not hardcode model names in skills or commands — use connector aliases only
Do not call the notifications connector from read-only subagents — only portfolio-manager may write
